reference: Hi, I have noticed a lump right under my right jawline. It is hard, maybe one inch in length, and does not move. It is painful yet uncomfortable when touched. I do not think it is a lymph node, but it seems to be what I have researched as a submandibular pleomorphic adenoma. Can you enlighten me more on this?
text: Hi, I have noticed a lump right under my right jawline. It is hard, maybe one inch in length and does not move. It is pain yet uncomfortable when touched. I do not think it is a lymph node, but it seems to be what I have researched as a submandibular pleomorphic adenoma. Can you enlighten me more on this?
